title: Specmatic Async Externalised Example
description: JSON shape for Specmatic externalised async examples used by the asyncapi spec extractor skill.

name.description: Human-readable example name used by Specmatic while loading and reporting examples.

id.description: Optional stable identifier for the example.

receive.description: Inbound message for receive-only and receive-reply flows.

send.description: Outbound message for send-only and receive-reply flows.

retry.description: Optional retry message example when the contract models retry behavior.

dlq.description: Optional dead-letter message example when the contract models DLQ behavior.

before.description: Optional fixtures executed before the main message exchange.

after.description: Optional fixtures executed after the main message exchange for verification or cleanup.

topic.description: Channel address or topic name used in the async exchange.

payload.description: Concrete example payload sent to or received from the broker.

key.description: Optional partitioning or routing key for brokers such as Kafka.

fixture.description: Permissive fixture object. Common cases include HTTP setup and HTTP verification fixtures.

wait.description: Optional ISO-8601 duration to wait before executing the fixture.
